title: Inclusive Enchants
description: Allow conflicting enchantments (ie. different protection types) on the same item.
body:
Allow conflicting enchantments (ie. different protection types) on the same item.

# Enchantment coverage

All armor protection enchants can be combined.

All boot enchants can be combined.

All damage enchantments can be combined.

# Notes

Trident enchantments are excluded as they are actully incompatible.

Maces, Bows, and Crossbows damage enchantments can only be applied to their respective item.

Enchantments compatible with only a specific item cannot be put on a different item. Example: Depth strider on leggings.
